core_result.summary: The WXYZTI overlay has a strong local selector chain. Signed G15 native profile reduces the role-block circulation candidates to 7. Observed support, q0/q3 inclusion, and shared junction C=2 reduce those to 2. Directed WXYZTI channel compatibility selects exactly the target circulation.

interpretation: This is a strong local selector chain for the WXYZTI role-block circulation. It shows that the target circulation is not arbitrary inside the signed G15/WXYZTI context. It is not, however, a G60-native generator derivation, because the directed WXYZTI transition table remains upstream.
next_problem: Derive or independently source the directed WXYZTI transition table from WXYZTI station constraints, oriented G15/G60 structure, old Hyperxi/G60 involution shadows, or another native object not using the directed transition table as an assumption.

selector_chain.result: 7 full native-profile matches among 25225200 valid ordered triples
2 candidates reduce to 1; target selected, non-target selected count 0

title: WXYZTI role-block selector chain for the Gap A subproblem
